_meta.source: meyers-flowers.com website extraction — rebranded for Arianna Buratti, Psychologist
_meta.notes: Values marked [AI_DEFAULT] are design recommendations, not official specs. Values marked [NEEDS_CONFIRM] require user decision. Colors and visual design sourced from meyers-flowers.com; all identity, copy, and content adapted for Arianna Buratti psychology practice.

identity.value_proposition_short: Arianna Buratti is a psychologist offering compassionate, evidence-based care to help individuals navigate life's challenges and achieve lasting wellbeing.
identity.value_proposition_mission: Arianna Buratti provides personalized psychological services grounded in empathy and clinical expertise, empowering clients to build resilience, deepen self-understanding, and create meaningful change in their lives.

primary.description: Horizontal wordmark — 'Arianna Buratti' in serif typography, clean and elegant
primary.usage_notes: Use approved artwork only. Black version on light backgrounds, white version on dark backgrounds. No recolor, distort, or effects.

icon.description: No standalone icon mark identified — wordmark is the primary identity element
icon.usage_notes: Use wordmark at all sizes. If a favicon is needed, consider 'AB' monogram in brand serif.

gold_light.role: Light gold / gradient start / hover alt

gold_gradient.role: Button fills, accent bars, decorative elements

warm_white.role: Section backgrounds, card fills, warm neutral

white.role: Page background, card background, inverse text

rules: Gold is the sole accent color — never introduce additional hues. The brand is deliberately restrained: gold + black + white.
Use warm white (#F0EDE9) for section alternation, not pure grey.
Dark backgrounds (#1A1818 or #000000) pair exclusively with white text and gold accents.
Limit to 3 colors (plus neutrals) per composition — the brand leans on contrast, not variety.

heading.name: Noto Serif Display
heading.web_fallback: "Noto Serif Display", Times, "Times New Roman", serif

body.name: Mona Sans
body.source_note: Mona Sans is a GitHub open-source font — may need self-hosting

display_accent.name: Noto Serif Display
display_accent.usage: Hero headlines, pull quotes, section titles. The serif creates a warm, professional tone.
display_accent.web_fallback: "Noto Serif Display", Times, "Times New Roman", serif

pdf_deck_fallback._note: [AI_DEFAULT] When custom fonts cannot be embedded

rules: Serif (Noto Serif Display) is for headlines and display text only — never for body copy.
Sans (Mona Sans) handles all body text, UI labels, navigation, and small text.
Buttons use uppercase, bold (700 weight), sans-serif.

spacing._note: [AI_DEFAULT] Practical defaults derived from site observation

shadows.usage: Minimal — mostly flat. Shadow only on interactive elements like forms.

dividers.style: Decorative divider element — clean and elegant
dividers.notes: Gold dividers for accent, light grey for neutral separation

icons.ui: Simple, flat, monochrome — gold on dark or dark on light

backgrounds.patterns: Dark photo backgrounds with gradient overlays (black to transparent)
backgrounds.overlay_style: Dark gradient overlays on hero/banner images for text legibility

animation.scroll_effects: Subtle scroll animation on desktop for hero text
animation.transitions: Subtle, professional — no playful or bouncy effects

html_landing_page.header: Top nav: logo left, text links center/right, single gold CTA button right. Dark background or transparent overlay.
html_landing_page.hero: Full-bleed dark photography with gradient overlay + large serif headline in white + gold accent
html_landing_page.footer: Dark background (#191818), white text, gold accent links. Contact details + social icons.
html_landing_page.tone: Warm, professional, trust-building. Strong serif headlines, concise body copy, clear gold CTAs.

one_pager_pdf.header: Logo top-left, doc title top-right in serif; optional gold accent bar
one_pager_pdf.footer: Single line: logo (small) + copyright + contact + page number
one_pager_pdf.contact_bar: Bottom strip: white text on charcoal; left: contact info; right: page X of Y
one_pager_pdf.images: Professional, warm-toned photography. No full-bleed except cover.
one_pager_pdf.tone: Concise, professional, scannable. Clinical clarity with accessible, empathetic language.

deck_pptx.title_slide: Large H1 (Noto Serif Display), gold accent bar, logo in corner. Dark or white bg.
deck_pptx.content_slides: Logo + slide number in footer only. One idea per slide, minimal text.
deck_pptx.closing_slide: Big serif heading ('Your wellbeing, your path.'), gold CTA bar, contact info.
deck_pptx.images: Full-bleed warm photography for cover/showcase; inset with gold borders otherwise.
deck_pptx.footer: Slide number + logo in bottom bar
deck_pptx.tone: Narrative, visual-heavy. Each slide = one idea. Warm, professional aesthetic.

content_defaults.boilerplate_short: Arianna Buratti is a psychologist providing compassionate, evidence-based care to help individuals navigate life's challenges and achieve lasting wellbeing.
content_defaults.boilerplate_mission: Arianna Buratti provides personalized psychological services grounded in empathy and clinical expertise, empowering clients to build resilience, deepen self-understanding, and create meaningful change in their lives.
content_defaults.legal_disclaimer: This website is for informational purposes only and does not constitute psychological or medical advice. No therapeutic relationship is formed by use of this site.

references.design_source: Visual design system sourced from meyers-flowers.com
references._note: Mona Sans requires self-hosting or GitHub CDN — not on Google Fonts
